start.title: FreshGuard
start.unlinked:
You are not linked to any store yet.

Send a six-digit invite code with /link XXXXXX to get connected.
start.linked_single_store:
You are linked to store: {store_name}.

Available actions:
- /invite create an invite code
- /unlink remove your membership
start.linked_multi_store:
You are linked to {memberships_count} stores.
Active store: {store_name}.

Use /stores to switch the active store, /invite to create an invite, and /unlink to remove yourself from a selected store.
help.body:
Available commands:
/start - show your current bot state
/help - show help
/ping - check bot availability
/link <code> - redeem a six-digit invite code
/stores - list stores and switch the active store
/devices - list devices for the active store
/last - show the latest detection for the active store
/invite - create an invite for the active store
/unlink - remove your membership from a store
link.invalid_code: Invite codes must contain exactly 6 digits. Try again with /link XXXXXX.
link.success: Done. You are now linked to store: {store_name}.
link.already_linked: This invite code has already been used for your membership.
link.revoked: That invite code has been revoked.
link.exhausted: That invite code has already reached its usage limit.
link.store_inactive: That invite belongs to an inactive store and cannot be used right now.
stores.empty: You are not linked to any stores yet. Use /link XXXXXX.
stores.single:
Active store: {store_name}.
You only have one store, so there is nothing to switch.
invite.created:
Invite code for store {store_name}: {code}

Share it with a teammate and ask them to run /link <code>.
invite.permission_denied: You do not have permission to create invites for the active store.
invite.no_active_store: There is no active store available for invite creation.
invite.store_inactive: The active store is inactive, so an invite cannot be created right now.
unlink.choose_store: Choose the store you want to unlink from.
unlink.confirm:
Are you sure you want to unlink from store {store_name}?
This removes your membership for that store.
unlink.success: Your membership for store {store_name} has been removed.
unlink.no_memberships: You do not have any store memberships to remove.
errors.generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.oms_unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.banned: Your access to the bot is restricted. Please contact support.
errors.permission_denied: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.no_active_store: There is no active store selected right now.
errors.store_not_found: That store is no longer available.
errors.not_linked: You are no longer linked to that store.
devices.choose: Devices for active store {store_name}. Choose one below.
devices.empty: There are no devices in store {store_name} yet.
devices.no_active_device: No device is selected right now. Open /devices and pick a device first.
devices.not_in_active_store: That device is no longer available in the active store.
devices.photo_unavailable: Photo capture is not available from the bot yet.
results.store_last_not_found: No detections were found yet for store {store_name}.
results.device_last_not_found: No detections were found yet for device {device_name}.
tare.menu: Choose how to apply tare for this device.
tare.confirm_unavailable: Tare confirmation is not available from the bot yet.
tare.reset_unavailable: Tare reset is not available from the bot yet.

bot_commands.stores: List stores and switch active store
bot_commands.invite: Create an invite for the active store
